info.name: Bee Flow
info.summary: AI-native workspace for chat, automation, and your Nextcloud apps
info.description:
Bee Flow is an AI workspace that connects your Nextcloud account to a hosted assistant capable of working across Files, Mail, Calendar, Deck, Notes, Tasks, Contacts, and Talk.
**What this app does** - Adds a Bee Flow icon to your Nextcloud top bar. - Authenticates you against your existing Nextcloud user — no second login. - Proxies UI requests to the hosted Bee Flow service so you can chat with an AI agent that has access to your Nextcloud data.
**Data flow disclosure** This connector forwards the following information to the hosted Bee Flow service at beeflow.ai: - Your Nextcloud account ID, email, and display name (used to identify your Bee Flow tenant). - The contents of any Nextcloud item you explicitly ask Bee Flow to act on (e.g. an email you ask the assistant to summarise).
The connector does **not** bulk-export file contents, contacts, or calendars. Privacy policy: https://beeflow.ai/privacy
**Requirements** - A Bee Flow account provisioned by your organisation's Bee Flow administrator. - A tenant key (issued by Bee Flow) configured in the AppAPI app settings.
info.author: Bee Flow B.V.
